domain: IT Fieldwork Management, Admin Dashboard & Mobile App
archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for Corporate IT

components.cards: bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500
buttons.accent: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500
buttons.outline: border border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

badges.pending: bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold
badges.in_progress: bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-500 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold
badges.completed: bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-500 border border-emerald-500/30 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold
badges.priority_high: bg-red-500/20 text-red-500 border border-red-500/30 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold

components.inputs: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent outline-none w-full transition-all
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-slate-900/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-800 flex justify-around items-center h-16 md:hidden z-50
components.header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/80 border-b border-slate-800 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-4 sm:px-6

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React icons. Ensure stroke-width is 2 for standard and 2.5 for emphasized actions. Use orange and blue accents for stateful icons.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first PWA architecture using React (.js) and Tailwind CSS. The app has two main views: Admin and Technician.
For the Admin role, implement a standard SaaS dashboard layout: sticky header, side navigation (hidden on mobile), and a bento-style grid for KPIs. Use the provided mockup as a strict reference.
For the Technician role, enforce a mobile-centric layout: bottom navigation bar, card-based task list, and large touch targets.
Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. Do not use pure black; use the slate-950/slate-800 palette.
Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Implement Shadcn UI components for complex interactive elements (Dialog, Tabs, Select, Form, DropdownMenu) and ensure they are customized with the dark theme colors.
For evidence photo upload, ensure the UI has a clear, large primary action area for capturing or uploading images.
The login screen should feature the provided corporate logo prominently.
